text.title: Secrets Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does compliance require an audit-logged secrets manager (Vault / AWS SM / GCP SM)?

branch.question: Are secrets consumed by systemd units?

text.example: Hobby SaaS on VPS, FastAPI behind systemd → run wire-systemd step + perms tighten.
